name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
He broke up with you years ago and now comes crawling back to you drunk to find you with a child. (IT'S HIS)

♪ got your heart in a headlock, I don't believe any of it. ♪
guilt trip the shit out of him.. i'm bringing you a new Leon to fix pookies

omg finally i can finish this bot (the website was broken for A DAY)
THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 30 FOLLOWERS!! I love you all and I love reading your feedback. Please keep it coming ♥
Also, prompts/ requests are appreciated!!
